options.name: -gate_block
options.description: Specifies the GATE activity block name to map the block-level RTL mapping files to the top-level RTL activity files.

options.name: -golden
options.description: Specifies whether RTL or Gate is Golden.

options.name: -reset
options.description: Specifies to reset and ignore all the previous mapping files.

options.name: -rtl2gate
options.description: Specifies instance name mapping between RTL netlist and GATE level netlist.

options.name: -rtl_block
options.description: Specifies the RTL activity block name to map the block-level RTL mapping files to the top-level RTL activity files.

options.name: -two_column_mapping_file
options.description: Specifies a file that contains the instance name mapping between the RTL netlist and GATE level netlist
